events.name: Oklahoma City Thunder at Washington Wizards

headlines.description: — Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scored 40 points and the Oklahoma Thunder pulled away in the fourth quarter to beat the Washington Wizards 132-111 on Saturday night for their 11th straight win, a game during which
headlines.shortLinkText: Gilgeous-Alexander scores 40, Thunder pull away for 132-111 win over Wizards after early scuffle
